actionUnits.condition: Manually invoke PlayQuickSound.Play() on Room_Modern prefab instance (m_PrefabInstance fileID=1865680026). Assumptions: (a) Added MonoBehaviour with fileID=1865680030 on Room_Modern is PlayQuickSound (per m_AddedComponents), (b) an AudioSource component exists due to [RequireComponent], and (c) the 'sound' AudioClip is assigned so AudioSource.PlayOneShot will actually play. OnValidate in PlayQuickSound ensures AudioSource.playOnAwake=false. No Rigidbody is present (Has_Rigidbody=false) and no m_Calls/Collider/EventTrigger are provided in the scene meta, so this manual trigger is required for coverage.
